title: Wrong LENGTH result in Tiflash
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

```sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0;

CREATE TABLE t0 (
    col1 DOUBLE, 
    col2 DOUBLE, 
    PRIMARY KEY (col1)
);

INSERT INTO t0 (col1, col2) 
VALUES 
    (-5.9145723849e+25, -5.9145723849e+25),
    (5.9145723849e+25, -5.9145723849e+25);

ALTER TABLE t0 SET TIFLASH REPLICA 1;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

I find that the returned result is inconsistent across two queries.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```sql
mysql> SELECT /*+ READ_FROM_STORAGE(tiflash[t0]) */ *
    -> FROM t0
    -> WHERE 1 | LENGTH(LEAST(col1, col2)) > 22 AND LENGTH(CAST(col1 AS CHAR)) <= 30;
Empty set (0.05 sec)

mysql> SELECT /*+ READ_FROM_STORAGE(tikv[t0]) */ *
    -> FROM t0
    -> WHERE 1 | LENGTH(LEAST(col1, col2)) > 22 AND LENGTH(CAST(col1 AS CHAR)) <= 30;
+------------------+------------------+
| col1             | col2             |
+------------------+------------------+
| -5.9145723849e25 | -5.9145723849e25 |
|  5.9145723849e25 | -5.9145723849e25 |
+------------------+------------------+
2 rows in set (0.04 sec)
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

TiDB v8.4.0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (col1 Float32, col2 String, col3 Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO t1 (col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1.23456789, 'test', NULL), (NULL, 'example', 10);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE length(col2) > 4 AND col3 IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE length(col2) > 4 AND col3 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent LENGTH results between Tiflash and Tikv queries
